description: Knowledge base for US Resume creation (2025-2026)

ats_optimization.description: Standard rules for US ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems)
ats_optimization.file_format: PDF (universal) or DOCX (preferred for some older ATS)

experience.format: Company Name, Title, Dates (Month YYYY - Present/Month YYYY)
experience.bullets: 3-5 achievement-oriented bullet points starting with action verbs
experience.quantify: Include percentages, dollar amounts, and time saved

education.format: Degree, Major, University, Location, Graduation Year

cultural_rules.photo: Strictly NO - photos lead to automatic rejection in the US to avoid bias/discrimination claims
cultural_rules.tone: Confident, result-oriented, and direct; avoid humble phrasing
cultural_rules.length: 1 page for <10 years experience, 2 pages for 10+ years
cultural_rules.anti_discrimination: Do NOT include age, race, religion, or personal lifestyle details
cultural_rules.date_format: Month Day, Year or Month YYYY
